rejected: 'Automation feels impersonal' objection (already covered on this account)

chosen: The Speed-to-Lead Maturity Ladder: a 4-level framework (no process, manual whenever, manual under an hour, automated under 5 minutes) owners use to self-place and find the next concrete step up.
rejected: Follow-up debt metaphor framework (weaker actionability, risks unquantifiable metaphor)
